commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers combine a patch correctness fix, contributor real behavior proof, and maintainer acceptance of process-wide proxy-bypass semantics.; Needs attention: No supply-chain issue was found, but the diff intentionally broadens which outbound requests can bypass an operator-configured proxy.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve dispatcher policy for bypassed requests — s... (sha=eefb9b24e32443098ecf2af19ba9a34cf275de76)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps global undici EnvHttpProxyAgent dispatchers so OpenClaw's enhanced NO_PROXY matcher can route matching requests through a direct Agent.

PR surface: Source +63, Tests +1. Total +64 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only review. The source path is clear because gateway startup installs a global EnvHttpProxyAgent under proxy env and the linked issue includes qqbot COS upload failure logs.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers combine a patch correctness fix, contributor real behavior proof, and maintainer acceptance of process-wide proxy-bypass semantics.

target.title: fix(proxy): apply enhanced NO_PROXY matching to global undici dispatcher (fixes #95998)
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #95998.

When `HTTPS_PROXY` is set in the environment, `ensureGlobalUndiciEnvProxyDispatcher()` installs a global undici `EnvHttpProxyAgent` that routes ALL HTTP requests through the proxy — including internal plugin requests that should bypass it via `NO_PROXY`. The built-in undici `EnvHttpProxyAgent` NO_PROXY matcher does not support leading-dot subdomain patterns, CIDR notation, or octet wildcards.

OpenClaw already has an enhanced `matchesNoProxy()` function that handles these formats — but it was only used by provider HTTP helpers, NOT by the global dispatcher.

## Changes Made

1. **NO_PROXY-aware dispatcher wrapper**: Wraps the global EnvHttpProxyAgent so each dispatch checks OpenClaw's enhanced `matchesNoProxy()` before routing through the proxy.
2. **All construction paths wrapped**: Applied in all three places that build an EnvHttpProxyAgent.

## Evidence

- **Unit tests:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/infra/net/proxy-env.test.ts` — 55/55 passed
- **Dispatcher tests:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/infra/net/undici-global-dispatcher.test.ts` — 33/33 passed

## Real behavior proof

**Environment:** Linux, Node 24.13.1, OpenClaw latest

Each test uses the actual `matchesNoProxy()` function that the PR wires into the global dispatcher:

```
✅ COS domain bypasses proxy with leading-dot (.myqcloud.com)
   URL: https://cos.ap-shanghai.myqcloud.com/bucket
   NO_PROXY: .myqcloud.com → matchesNoProxy = true

✅ External domain routes through proxy (not bypassed)
   URL: https://api.openai.com/v1/chat
   NO_PROXY: .myqcloud.com → matchesNoProxy = false

✅ CIDR range bypasses proxy
   URL: http://100.64.0.3:8990
   NO_PROXY: 100.64.0.0/10 → matchesNoProxy = true

✅ localhost/127.0.0.1 bypass proxy
   URL: http://localhost:8080/test
   NO_PROXY: localhost,127.0.0.1 → matchesNoProxy = true
```

- [x] AI-assisted
target.author: zw-xysk

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
